name: Extreme Jelly Shift 3D Game
description: Extreme Jelly Shift 3D is a fun casual game. Do you like jelly? The soft jelly can change its shape. In this game, you can control the changeable jelly on an obstacle course! Protect your jelly from being crashed and reach the finish line! Have fun!
tags: 3D, 3D Games, Fun, Funny, H5, HTML5, Kid, Kids
